--- title: core keywords: fastai sidebar: home_sidebar summary: "This notebook has the Core functions for the Water Classification project" description: "This notebook has the Core functions for the Water Classification project" ---
{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

save_obj[source]

save_obj(obj, name)

{% endraw %}

Util

{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

load_obj[source]

load_obj(name)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

wavelength_range[source]

wavelength_range(ini_wl, last_wl, step=1)

Creates a range of wavelengths from initial to last, in a defined nanometers step.

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

calc_area[source]

calc_area(df, bands=None, col_name='area')

Calc the integral of the curve and adds it to a new column.

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

normalize[source]

normalize(df, bands=None, inplace=False)

Normalize the reflectance spectra by dividing all reflectance values by the area under the curve. All normalized spectra will have area=1.

{% endraw %}

Charting

{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

apply_subplot[source]

apply_subplot(fig, subplot, position)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

showfig[source]

showfig(fig, buttonsToRemove=[])

Converts a plotly figure into a HTML graph and displays it. That is necessary to maintain the interactive functionality of plotly in the jekyll documentation, on Github.

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

log_color_scatter[source]

log_color_scatter(*args, **kwargs)

Proxy for px.scatter applying log to the color scale.

{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

series_to_annotation[source]

series_to_annotation(s)

create a formatted annotation string given the series

{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

cluster_and_plot_scatter[source]

cluster_and_plot_scatter(df, bands, clusters, x, y, color, continuous=True, hover_name=None, labels=None, title='cluster', log_y=False, height=300, marker_size=4)

Do the clustering and plot a scatter with the informed axes.

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

multi_cluster_and_plot[source]

multi_cluster_and_plot(dfs, bands, clusters_range, x, y, color, continuous=True, hover_name=None, labels=None, title='cluster', log_y=False, log_x=False, height=300, marker_size=4, dfs_names=None)

Creates a grid of len(dfs) rows and len(clusters_range) columns to compare different clustering results

{% endraw %}

Clustering & PCA

{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

PCA_decomposition[source]

PCA_decomposition(df, calc_bands, inf_bands=None, n_components=2)

Applies PCA decomposition in Dataframe df, using the bands specified in calc_bands. Inf_bands will be returned. If None is specified, the full dataframe with PCA columns will be returned

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

clusterize[source]

clusterize(df, calc_bands, inf_bands=None, n_clusters=2)

{% endraw %}

Statistics

{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

calc_df_grouped_stats[source]

calc_df_grouped_stats(df, groupby, variables, nameslist, funcslist)

Calculate the statistics of a dataframe, grouped by a field, given a list of variables and aggregate functions

{% endraw %}

Curve Fitting

{% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

nir_red_ratio[source]

nir_red_ratio(x, a, b)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

linear[source]

linear(x, a, b)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

expo[source]

expo(x, a, b)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

power[source]

power(x, a, b)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

poly[source]

poly(x, a, b, c, d)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

nechad[source]

nechad(red, a=610.94, c=0.2324)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

fit_curve[source]

fit_curve(func, X, y)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

calc_errors[source]

calc_errors(X, y, func, params=[], decimal=2)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

plot_data_and_curve[source]

plot_data_and_curve(df, X, y, color, hover_name, hover_data, xlabel, func, params=[], title='', height=600)

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

fit_and_plot_curve[source]

fit_and_plot_curve(df, X, y, color, hover_name, hover_data, xlabel, func, height=600)

{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
from nbdev.export import *
notebook2script()

Converted 00_core.ipynb.
Converted 00_Data_Preparation.ipynb.
Converted 01_EDA.ipynb.
Converted 02_Unnormalized_analysis.ipynb.
Converted 03-2_Normalized_Bright_analysis.ipynb.

Converted 04_SPM_Analysis-unnorm_cluster.ipynb.
Converted 05-2_Random_Forests-Norm.ipynb.
Converted 05_Random_Forests.ipynb.
Converted 06_Clustering_assessment.ipynb.
Converted 06_Norm-Clustering_assessment.ipynb.
Converted 07-2_Clustering_assessment-norm.ipynb.
Converted 07_Clustering_assessment-Copy1.ipynb.
Converted 10-AutoEncoder.ipynb.
Converted 11-VAE.ipynb.
Converted index.ipynb.
Converted Reflectances_1.ipynb.
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
